name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-29
title: IMPL_SHA capture timing in close-call block is racy with feature.json commit
description: dispatch-tdd-subagent.py close-call block (lines 231-236) emits 'IMPL_SHA=$(git rev-parse HEAD)' AFTER the test-green transition is committed AND after the feature.json chore commit. So IMPL_SHA is actually the chore commit SHA, not the implementation commit SHA. The HANDOFF and item close calls record the wrong commit. Either move close-calls BEFORE the chore commit (so HEAD is still impl), or capture IMPL_SHA right after the actual implementation commit in Step 6 and pass it forward to Step 9. Currently the close-records will reference an unrelated chore commit.

history.note: Fixed as part of Wave 1 bundle in PR (BUG-15/18/22/28/29 all addressed by dispatch-tdd-subagent.py prompt edits).
